title: 札幌記念の後に・Home Straight

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hehe, so?! Are you shocked, Groove?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I certainly am. My goodness, but you really are
outrageous!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
However, your ability to pull off feats like this is
testament to your true strength.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You're outrageous, you show interest in anything
and everything... and yet, you don't let on to
what truly is going through your head.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
If nothing else, I wanted to beat you and force
you to voice your true feelings today.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Groove...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I haven't given up. I can't very well walk my ideal
path while I remain bested by you.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
We'll race again, Fine. I won't take no for an
answer. I expect you've come to terms with
leaving, but there's still some time before you do,
yes?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Groove... Yes, I'll definitely consider it!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but this is your petition to challenge me,
right? In that case, could I add a condition?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
When we get back to the academy, I want you to
take me to the ramen shop you think is best!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Whichever one you like is fine by me. Would that
be all right?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
...All right. I'll mull it over until I find somewhere
that'll turn your entire perception of ramen
upside-down.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Excellent, I can't wait! ♪ And if you're going
looking for ramen shops, I'll come with you!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
That would make the whole thing pointless!
...Good grief.

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text: Your Highness! There's a call from your sister.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Y-your sister?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion's older sister is an exceptional
Umamusume who is currently competing all over
the globe. I know her only by reputation.

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text: Her Highness wishes to speak with Air Groove.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, Air Groove is her favorite.
Do you mind, Groove?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Don't put her through! Tell her I've already gone
home!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh, dear... I'm terribly sorry, Captain, but could
you tell my sister that Groove is unavailable?

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text:
...Um, actually, she said she'd like to speak to
your trainer instead if that were to be the case.

text_block_list.name: Fine's Older Sister
text_block_list.text:
Yes, hello there? Are you the trainer responsible
for my dear little princess?

text_block_list.name: Fine's Older Sister
text_block_list.text:
Are you frightened? That's a shame—I prefer
strong-willed types. One must hold back when
dealing with the meek.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My first impression of Fine Motion's sister is that
she has a... unique personality.

text_block_list.name: Fine's Older Sister
text_block_list.text:
A let-down to be sure, but I don't doubt you can
get the job done. Now, let's get to the heart of
the matter.

text_block_list.name: Fine's Older Sister
text_block_list.text:
There's something I absolutely must say to you.
And that is... thank you.

text_block_list.name: Fine's Older Sister
text_block_list.text:
I made the decision to pursue a racing career
from an early age. As such, my dear sister was left
to shoulder the duties I left behind.

text_block_list.name: Fine's Older Sister
text_block_list.text:
She would claim she shoulders them of her own
volition, but deep down, I've always harbored
some guilt—I essentially locked that innocent
young girl away in the castle by my own hand.

text_block_list.name: Fine's Older Sister
text_block_list.text:
Which is why, now, seeing her running so freely in
Japan... I feel a weight lifted from my own
shoulders.

text_block_list.name: Fine's Older Sister
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for enabling her to express her true
feelings and explore the wider world.

text_block_list.name: Fine's Older Sister
text_block_list.text:
I trust you'll continue to take good care of her in
the future as well.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hey, what is she saying? Can I hear?

text_block_list.name: Fine's Older Sister
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, is that the chirping of my little dove I hear?
Could you put Fine Motion on?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hello, dear sister! Thank you for that passionate
letter you sent the other day. It was very
touching.

text_block_list.name: Fine's Older Sister
text_block_list.text:
Mere words hardly sufficed to capture my love for
you... Oh! I've finally succeeded in running half
the world's circumference.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I never doubted you for a moment! Were
those spots on the paper from sweat, then? I
thought perhaps you had spilled some tea.

text_block_list.name: Fine's Older Sister
text_block_list.text:
Why, they were from the tears I shed longing for
your company, of course. ...Though, there might
be some Assam tea mixed in there.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This peculiar back and forth between Fine Motion
and her sister continues for some time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before we can return to summer camp from
Hokkaido, something unexpected occurs.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Fine! Is it true that you're quitting racing?!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
...!
Captain?

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text:
...I've confirmed the situation. It appears that
information pertaining to our recent meeting about your
return home somehow leaked.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
...
Well, I suppose the truth was going to get out
eventually.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
It's true. After this year, I will be returning to
Ireland to carry out my official duties.

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text:
No way!
You mean we'll never get to see you race again?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I am truly grateful for all the support and
encouragement you've given me until now.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I have... one last request for you all.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Please do watch my final race. I would like to—

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: No. I definitely will carve a space for myself in your hearts.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: So please... Will you come watch me?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'll be holding a press conference to provide
further details. For now... farewell.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps stunned by Fine Motion's sincerity, the
fans watch in silence as we leave.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After returning to the summer campgrounds, I
decide that now is the time to speak to Fine
Motion about her next race.
choice_data_list: This next one could be your final race.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: ...I know.
choice_data_list: I've narrowed it down to four options.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've taken the time and rank of the races into
consideration and, more importantly, I've
weighed them by whether the opponents might
make her last race a truly enjoyable one.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've landed on the autumn Tenno Sho, the Queen
Elizabeth II Cup, the Mile Championship, and the
Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: ... Just checking, but... theoretically, I could enter all of them, couldn't I?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
It's just that you'd like me to choose one final
race to take on in peak condition?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: ...Could I have a little time to think about it?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
One day should be enough. I just need to... sort
out my feelings.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if she plans to shoulder this decision
alone again.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I decide to have faith and leave things in her
hands.
